OUR STORY
Made with
intention.

Kae designs handcrafted contemporary pieces in Saigon. Each piece is made with intention — hand-embellished details, structured silhouettes, and bespoke tailoring.

We work in small batches between ready-to-wear and made-to-order drops. Every flower, every sequin, every seam is finished by hand in our studio. We design clothes for the woman who wants to feel something when she gets dressed.

— K.

SHIPPING & RETURNS
Getting your
pieces to you.

All orders are handcrafted in Saigon and shipped worldwide.

Shipping

Ready-to-ship: 3–5 business days.

Made-to-order: 10–14 business days.

Worldwide tracked courier.

ASIA: $15 · US/EU: $25 · REST OF WORLD: $30

Returns

14 days for ready-to-ship items.

Made-to-order is final sale.

Customer covers return shipping.

Contact kae.fficial@gmail.com

Sizing

Available in S–M.

Contact us for custom measurements.

Care

Hand wash cold or dry clean.

Store on padded hangers.
